question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/config/HieroPropertiesMigrator.java -> Scope: Medium: Incorrect or missing records exported to mirror nodes'] [Function: migrate()] Can an unprivileged external user inject `hedera.mirror.importer.parser.record.entity.persist.entityHistory=false` into a property source so that `migrate()` produces `hiero.mirror.importer.parser.record.entity.persist.entityHistory=false`, causing historical entity state changes to be silently dropped and resulting in incorrect entity state records exported to the mirror node?
